rr NaN  (start of reverse missing)
r 1'r 1'

[...] ⸢iš-ku⸣-nam!(NU-)⸢ma?⸣ [...]

He set up [...] and [...].

r 2'2'

[... maš]-ka ma-aṣ-ṣa-⸢ra⸣ [...]

[...] the skin, [...] a guard,

r 3'3'

[... la] ⸢šu⸣-ṣa-a [...]

[... not] to let [...] escape.

r 4'4'

[...] aš₂-ra-ta [...]

[...] the firmament,

r 5'5'

[... mi]-iḫ-⸢ret⸣ ap-si-⸢i⸣ [...]

[...] equal to the Apsu, [...].

r 6'6'

[...] ⸢be-lu₄⸣ ša₂ ap-[si-i ...]

r 7'7'

he established [...] as the likeness of [...].
